scripts.deploy: bash -lc 'set -a && source .env && set +a && npm run build && rsync -avz -e "ssh -i $DEPLOY_SSH_KEY" --exclude "node_modules" --exclude ".git" . $DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST:$DEPLOY_PATH && ssh -i "$DEPLOY_SSH_KEY" $DEPLOY_USER@$DEPLOY_HOST "bash -lc \"cd $DEPLOY_PATH && npm ci --production=false && (pm2 restart my-portfolio || npx pm2 start npm --name my-portfolio -- run start) && pm2 save\""'
